evidence.text: M0'-SPEC.md enumerates all six M0-X' layers (grep 6/6); new Body/M/epi-theia/extensions/m0-anuttara/src/common/m0-layers.ts defines M0LayerView discriminator + M0_LAYER_VIEWS (M0-4'->m4-nara, M0-5'->m5-epii bridged deep-links, mutatesGraphCanon:false); m0-inspector model carries layerViews; pnpm --filter @pratibimba/m0-anuttara build (tsc -b) clean.

DR-M1-1 audit: alpha_quaternionic_integration_across_M_stack.md is internally inconsistent on the +1 parent. Lines 45 & 77 correctly state M0 is prior 0/1 ground that does NOT instantiate the +1; lines 101 & 104 wrongly attribute the +1 to 'M0 Anuttara witness-axis' ('M0's witness-axis as the +1 holding the whole'). Per standing invariant (+1 = M1-5 not M0), the live-attribution patch targets ONLY lines 101 & 104 (replace +1-attribution with 'M1-5 the +1 parent per M1-SPEC §1'); lines 45/77/90/353/711/764 keep 'witness-axis' as legitimate M0 prior-ground function. BLOCKED pending user final-validation of DR-M1-1 — canon-source contradiction, not autonomous-patchable.

Audit confirms codon_rotation_projection.rs IS the canonical materialized kernel LUT (dataset_lut_state='materialized-kernel-lut' line 148, not placeholder), per M3'-SPEC §7. Extended round-trip coverage in tests/m_prime_shared_contracts.rs: +codon_rotation_projection_is_canonical_kernel_lut_not_placeholder (asserts materialized state + 84<->472 provenance + stored reverse anchor over all 84 lens-mode cells) and +every_surface_cell_reverse_addresses_a_lens_mode (all 472 surface cells reverse-map + domain guards reject over-range codon/rotation). cargo check clean; cargo test --test m_prime_shared_contracts: 7 passed/0 failed. No rebuild.

rationale: Simulated each selected task as done before choosing the next task, so downstream dependencies can enter the route.
